title: Submersible Solutions In Oil & Gas
description:
Founded in 2016, This company provides comprehensive sales and field services to the oil and gas industry, specializing in Electric Submersible Pump systems. With two facilities in Oklahoma and a customer base of 80–100 clients, it is known for its fast turnaround times, hands-on service model, and exceptional customer relationships. Services include equipment testing, spooling, custom system engineering, and proprietary monitoring technology (OTS) already deployed on 160+ wells.

Backed by a seasoned team with over 30 years of industry experience, this company serves the Southern Mid-Continent region with plans to expand into Texas, Kansas, and Arkansas. The business operates with minimal debt, strong repeat revenue (80%), and modern infrastructure. Real estate is included in the sale, and ownership is willing to stay on post-sale to support continued growth.

Refer to File #73788MM. Please respond with your name, email/mail address and telephone no. so we may send a confidentiality agreement. Photo – Oilfield, Photographer-Duncan Sanchez, Unsplash.

Ad#:2398887
